prices.source_phrase: Active & Career retired military personnel - FREE
prices.source_block:
Military & First Responders

Active & Career retired military personnel - FREE

Veterans - $20

First Responders  (Police, Fire, EMT, & Paramedics) $15

Accompanied Adults – $24

Accompanied Children (5 -12) – $16

Accompanied Seniors/Students – $20

Must present service identification card at the ticket booth
